title: The Eternal Power Station Dream

features.name: phantom-generators
features.desc-on-touch: the turbines have stopped turning, but they hum still—a frequency only machines remember, singing in sleep.

features.name: circuit-paths-glowing
features.desc-on-touch: power flows through dead wires; the archive has learned to read the dreams in every disconnected line.

features.name: control-room-mirror
features.desc-on-touch: switches that remember every night they were flipped; gauges that still believe they are measuring something real.

features.name: coal-pile-dreaming
features.desc-on-touch: fuel that was never burned, piled like a monument to energy that chose not to escape.

features.name: transformer-garden
features.desc-on-touch: where current becomes consciousness; the archive has filed this as local history, though nothing here was ever local.

inscription: the machines never learned that being turned off did not mean forgetting how to dream

file.name: PowerStation_MaintenanceLog_Final_1987.txt
file.note: the night the generators fell silent but kept singing inside

exits.label: where phantom electricity becomes alive again
deeper into the station's dreaming basement
where the power lines touch the sky
back toward the surface where lights have stopped
